case_title: JULIE HUGHES BARBETTI VS. CLUB ONE, INC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-21-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-24-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BARBETTI, JULIE HUGHES AS TO DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED APR-27-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARBETTI, JULIE HUGHES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
